👋
Meet OJ & Vartika ▶ Co-Founders of ScratchBox.Media
Who are we?
<<<<<<< HEAD

We're not your agency. We're your unfair advantage.

Most agencies hand you a brand deck and wish you luck. We stick around through the strategy, the build, the launch, and the part where it actually has to work in the real world.

OJ and Vartika started ScratchBox.media because great brands deserved better than being treated like invoice numbers. Every client we take on gets the same thing: direct access to our team, honest opinions, and work we'd put our names on.

=======

An independent creative studio that helps brands grow — starting from scratch.

At ScratchBox.media, we believe every great brand has a bold "what if?" at its core. We take that idea and turn it into something the world can't ignore.

Whether you need a high-converting website, a brand identity that turns heads, or content that keeps audiences coming back — we're your creative partner for the whole journey.

>>>>>>> 74172b25837056634a7e0f11d5347b610c7c3ea2

Our Expertise
<<<<<<< HEAD

Things we do.
One reason we
do them.

Most agencies hand you off to a different team every time you need something new. At ScratchBox, one dedicated team owns your account end to end — one conversation, across every service, for the entire journey

=======

How we take
your brand to
the next level

We're a digital marketing and creative studio on a mission to help you make your mark. From strategy to execution — we've got you covered.
